: Saved
: Hardware:   ASA5515
!
ASA Version 9.8(4)
!
hostname lab-asa-coverage
!
interface GigabitEthernet0/0
 nameif inside
 security-level 100
 ip address 10.40.0.1 255.255.255.0
!
http server enable
logging enable
logging console debugging
logging host inside 10.40.0.10
snmp-server host inside 10.40.0.20 version 3 weakuser
snmp-server group monGrp v3 auth
snmp-server user weakuser monGrp v3 auth md5 AuthPass priv des PrivPass
crypto ikev2 policy 10
 encryption aes-256
 integrity sha384
 group 20
 lifetime seconds 172800
: end
